title: What To Expect From SoundHound AI Inc (SOUN) Q4 2024 Earnings
text: SoundHound AI is scheduled to report Q4 2024 earnings on February 27, 2025. Analysts anticipate quarterly revenue of $33.69 million with earnings per share of -$0.10. For the full year 2024, the company is projected to generate $83.84 million in revenue with losses of -$0.38 per share. Revenue forecasts for 2025 have declined modestly to $165.26 million, while earnings estimates have shown improvement, moving from -$0.26 to -$0.25 per share over the past 90 days. In Q3 2024, SoundHound exceeded expectations, delivering $25.09 million in revenue when analysts projected $23.02 million—a 9% beat. However, the stock declined 17% following the release. Seven analysts provide an average 12-month price target of $13.36, suggesting 50.5% upside potential. The consensus recommendation indicates Outperform status, though GuruFocus detected three warning signs with the stock.
